description: Create a channel named 'Fail_Safe_Archiver' that handles message delivery failures by immediately archiving the raw message to a file. The channel must listen on TCP port 6661 (MLLP) and attempt to send messages to localhost:9999. It must be configured to 'Fail Fast' (no queuing, 0 retries). Use a JavaScript Post-Processor script to detect destination failures (Status: ERROR or FAILURE) and write the raw message content to /tmp/failed_messages/ using the message ID as the filename with a .hl7 extension. Process the sample HL7 message from /home/ga/sample.hl7 to verify the archival of the failed delivery.
